description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical shampoo bottle with rounded shoulders and a pump dispenser on top. The bottle is predominantly a deep blue color with white printed text and branding, including the name 'RIOBELO' and product details such as 'Açai Deep Cleansing Shampoo'. The front label features bold, professional typography and a step indicator, while the back and sides are densely covered with product information, instructions, and symbols in multiple languages. The pump mechanism is white and gray, contrasting with the blue body, and the base of the bottle is slightly wider and gray. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for both professional and consumer environments.
description: A tall, cylindrical blue shampoo bottle with a white pump dispenser and detailed white labeling. The design is sleek and professional, with dense text and branding.
description_view_0: The left-rear side of the bottle, showing dense white text and product information, as well as the barcode and recycling symbols.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main branding, product name, and step indicator in bold white text, with the pump dispenser clearly visible on top.
description_view_2: The right side of the bottle, featuring vertical lines of white text and symbols, with less branding and more regulatory or ingredient information.
description_view_3: The rear view, showing a large block of white text, additional product details, and various symbols, with the pump and rounded shoulders visible.
attribute_brand_logo: RIOBELO logo in bold white uppercase letters on the front.
attribute_label_text: RIOBELO Professional Hair Care System Açai Deep Cleansing Shampoo STEP 1.0 New Texture Technology RB 1L e 33.8 fl oz
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with rounded shoulders and a narrow neck topped by a pump
